title: Learn how Professor David J. Malan realized computer science is the field for him.
summary: Professor David J. Malan shares his journey realizing computer science was the right field for him. This video is part of CS50, Harvard University's foundational computer science course offered through multiple platforms including edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare.
writeup: Professor David J. Malan recounts how he came to recognize computer science as the right field for him. The clip sits within CS50, Harvard University's foundational computer science course distributed through edX, the Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare. The takeaway is personal rather than technical: a first-person account of the path that led the course's longtime instructor into the discipline.
